description: Program-memory v3 caveat log for one adjudicated program.

required_fields.name: caveat_kind
required_fields.description: Caveat family such as reporting, design, or exposure.

required_fields.name: applies_to_kind
required_fields.description: Artifact or claim type the caveat applies to.

required_fields.name: applies_to_id
required_fields.description: Identifier of the artifact or claim the caveat applies to.

required_fields.name: severity
required_fields.description: Severity or importance label for the caveat.

optional_fields.name: source_document_id
optional_fields.description: Source document anchoring the caveat when applicable.
